column2: Most of the stack info is known but if not can be filled in and details can be listed here
Stack: VaultSpeed, Snowflake, GitLab, Airflow, custom Python/CI-CD tooling.
column3: Why chosen: evolved from Cloudera to Snowflake migration; optimized for speed, stability, and preserving existing processes.
column4: Working well: fast Snowflake deploys, stable pipeline, parallel execution, improved repo/process design.
column5: Pain points: manual reload workflows, BV full-generation slowness, too much custom logic, difficult partial reloads.
column6: Restrictions: keep current CI/CD stable, role separation, compatibility with existing naming/query patterns.
column7: Preferred but missing: Business Vault delta generation, simpler standard supported flow, future Airflow 3 improvements.
